conversations.ai_question: Hello! Welcome to our interview. I am excited to learn about you. Could you start by telling me about your background and what brought you to QA engineer?
conversations.user_answer: Okay, so I did my bachelor's in computer science and I really liked working with  QA automation and testing stuff. Like I really wanted to know what causes the bugs and how  does that bug is covered and managed. Hence, I got into QA side.

conversations.ai_question: That's interesting, so it sounds like you have a strong foundation in computer science and a curiosity about how bugs are identified and managed. Can you walk me through a specific project you've worked on that involved testing and QA, and what tools you used to identify and manage bugs?
conversations.user_answer: Okay, so basically what I did was that I created an end-to-end framework to test, so I tested  on e-commerce website and I used Selenium for that.
